Test Case Name: TC01_Verify Contractors Equipment Form ZC 6356 Display with Latest Edition_Inland Marine_New Business_R1
Description: The objective of this test case is to validate that the Contractors Equipment form ZC 6356 is displayed with correct version and edition date (03/25) in the Inland Marine LOB for new business submissions
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields
2. User should be able to create a submission successfully
3. User should be able to view the line selection screen
4. User should be able to select Inland Marine LOB from available options
5. User should be able to view the Inland Marine screen with all mandatory fields

Action: 6. Verify Contractors Equipment coverage option is available
Expected Result: 6. User should be able to view Contractors Equipment coverage in the coverage options list
7. User should be able to select the Contractors Equipment coverage option
8. User should be able to view form ZC 6356 in the form list

Action: 9. Verify form edition date is displayed as 03/25
Expected Result: 9. User should be able to see the form edition date displayed as 03/25 (March 2025 edition)
10. User should be able to view the complete form version and edition metadata
